scope: Extend the security discovery tranche from 6 to 9 collected candidates and refresh the corrected 9-domain hybrid read

decision_context.prior_state: The second security tranche had 6 accepted candidates and one clear watchlist leader in the bounded hybrid run.
decision_context.decision: Add three more security-review candidates, refresh the partial pilot result to 9 accepted domains, and rerun the bounded hybrid validation from the updated result.
decision_context.why_now: The security wedge was the strongest active frontier slice, so the highest-value next move was to keep collecting inside that wedge before opening another cluster.

files_expected.purpose: Stores the next three security-cluster candidates.
Updates the pilot progress to 9 filled agents.
Stores the refreshed 9-candidate partial pilot result.
Stores the corrected 9-domain bounded hybrid run.

planned_steps: Fill three more security-cluster agent slots with evidence-grounded candidates
Refresh the partial pilot result and progress surface to 9 accepted candidates
Rerun the bounded hybrid validation and promotion read from the corrected 9-domain result

commands: $env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m chip_labs.cli mirofish-discovery-program-progress --input-dir research/meta/mirofish_discovery_pilot_100_clusters_2026-03-24 --output research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_PROGRESS_2026-03-24.json --markdown-output research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_PROGRESS_2026-03-24.md --title "MiroFish Discovery Pilot 100 Progress"

$env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m chip_labs.cli mirofish-discovery-program-brief --input research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_RESULT_2026-03-24.json --title "MiroFish Discovery Pilot 100 Result" --output research/meta/MIROFISH_DISCOVERY_PROGRAM_PILOT_100_RESULT_2026-03-24.md
$env:PYTHONPATH='src'; python -m pytest tests/test_mirofish_discovery.py tests/test_watchtower.py tests/test_mirofish_portfolio.py tests/test_trend_prediction.py -q
expected_checks: The pilot progress snapshot shows 9 filled agents and 9 raw candidates
The refreshed partial pilot result accepts all 9 candidates as clear_domain_chip
The corrected hybrid read shows at least two security candidates clearing or near the benchmark median
The focused regression suite stays green

guardrails: Do not rely on stale markdown or spec artifacts when the JSON result has already advanced to 9 candidates
Treat the corrected 9-domain hybrid artifacts as the valid read for this tranche
Keep this as a security-cluster expansion rather than treating the overall pilot as complete
